happy.message: You made this place feel safe. You advocated for others without being asked. You showed up — really showed up. That's the rarest thing!

sad.message: It's hard to put into words how much you've meant to this team. We're going to miss your calm presence so much.

miserable.message: If you're struggling today, please be gentle with yourself. You've looked after so many of us — let someone look after you now.
